title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 238.205 - Purpose of district — district to be political subdivision
text:
238.205.  Purpose of district — district to be political subdivision. — 1.  A district may be created to fund, promote, plan, design, construct, improve, maintain, and operate one or more projects or to assist in such activity.
  2.  A district is a political subdivision of the state.
(L. 1990 S.B. 479 & 649 § 37) 
Effective 5-30-90
